instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
Top 5 Reasons NRIs in Riyadh & Jeddah Choose Bajaj Allianz Term Plans
Many Indians move to Saudi Arabia’s cities like Riyadh and Jeddah for work, business, or even for higher education. As the NRI population grows in these prominent cities, financial planning for families back in India becomes important.
NRIs are allowed to invest in different avenues in India to diversify their portfolios and create a corpus for their financial goals. When it comes to financial security for loved ones, term insurance plans from Bajaj Allianz come to the aid of NRIs living in Riyadh and Jeddah.
Term insurance plans are protection-oriented policies that aim to provide financial assistance to your loved ones if you pass away untimely. With the right term plan in place, NRIs can gift financial security to their families, whether in Saudi Arabia or back in India. Moreover, buying Bajaj Allianz term plans comes with its share of benefits. Let’s understand what.
5 Reasons why NRIs in Riyadh and Jeddah choose Bajaj Allianz term plans
Let’s explore the top 5 ways in which Bajaj Allianz term plans fulfil the different needs of NRIs in Saudi Arabia –
Reason 1: INR Premiums, Saudi Rial Income
NRIs in Saudi Arabia earn in Saudi Rial, which is stronger than the Indian Rupee (INR). Since the currency of their resident country is stronger, NRIs have a higher purchasing power when it comes to buying life insurance plans in India. This helps them choose a suitable sum assured at affordable premiums.
Moreover, while NRIs earn in Saudi Rial, they can pay the premium in INR through their NRO (Non-Resident Ordinary) or NRE (Non-Resident External) account. These accounts are INR-denominated and help them transfer their foreign income to India to pay the premiums easily.
Reason 2: Nominee Support in India
NRIs have the flexibility to appoint a nominee of their choice in Bajaj Allianz term insurance plans. If they have their family or ageing parents living in India, they can nominate them in the policy for hassle-free claims.
Resident Indian nominees can make a claim on the policy if the NRI passes away by following the simplified claim process offered by Bajaj Allianz. With features like a 99.29% claim settlement ratio for the financial year 2024-251 and 1-day claim approvals in non-investigative cases1, Bajaj Allianz offers a smooth and quick claim settlement process.
Reason 3: Flexible Terms + Riders
Bajaj Allianz term insurance plans offer complete flexibility in the choice of sum assured, policy term, premium payment term, frequency, riders, etc. This allows NRIs to choose policy details that align with their coverage requirements and financial needs.
Reason 4: No Need to Visit India
One of the main benefits of buying life insurance in India is that NRIs don’t have to make a trip back home just to buy the policy. They can buy the policy from Riyadh or Jeddah through the online channels offered by Bajaj Allianz.
You can simply visit the company’s website, choose the term insurance plan available, fill out the online proposal form, upload your documents and pay the premium online. Your proposal would be submitted and underwritten quickly so that you can enjoy the coverage as early as possible.
Conclusion
You might be an NRI residing in Riyadh or Jeddah, but your financial responsibilities might span beyond geographical boundaries. Life insurance term plans can help you fulfil these responsibilities and provide financial security to your loved ones in your absence.
So, take the first step towards financial protection and buy a term insurance plan. When looking for reputed providers, choose Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Company, which, with its experience and expertise, can give you a hassle-free experience, both when buying the policy and at the time of claims. So, choose right; gift your family protection and get peace of mind for yourself with Bajaj Allianz term insurance plans.
FAQs
Do Bajaj Allianz term insurance plans offer global coverage?
Yes, Bajaj Allianz term insurance plans cover you wherever you are, in Saudi Arabia, India or anywhere else in the world. If you pass away during the policy, irrespective of your resident country, a death benefit would be paid under the term insurance policy.
What documents would be needed to buy Bajaj Allianz term insurance plans?
The documentation depends on the company’s underwriting policies. However, some of the common documents needed to buy term insurance plans from Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance include the following –
Identity proof
Overseas address proof
Income proof
Copy of passport and Visa
Medical reports, if applicable, etc.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions, please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale. Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Company Ltd., Regd. office Address: Bajaj Allianz House, Airport Road, Yerawada, Pune - 411006, Reg. No.: 116, CIN: U66010PN2001PLC015959, Call us on toll free No.: 1800 209 7272, Mail us: customercare@bajajallianz.co.in

Top 5 Reasons NRIs in Riyadh & Jeddah Choose Bajaj Allianz Life Term Plans
Many Indians move to Saudi Arabia’s cities like Riyadh and Jeddah for work, business, or even for higher education. As the NRI population grows in these prominent cities, financial planning for families back in India becomes important.
NRIs are allowed to invest in different avenues in India to diversify their portfolios and create a corpus for their financial goals. When it comes to financial security for loved ones, term insurance plans from Bajaj Allianz Life come to the aid of NRIs living in Riyadh and Jeddah.
Term insurance plans are protection-oriented policies that aim to provide financial assistance to your loved ones in case of your untimely demise during the policy term. With the right term plan in place, NRIs can provide financial security to their families, whether in Saudi Arabia or back in India. Moreover, buying Bajaj Allianz Life term plans comes with its share of benefits. Let’s understand what.

Moreover, while NRIs earn in Saudi Rial, they can pay the premium in INR through their NRO (Non- Resident Ordinary) or NRE (Non-Resident External) account or through swift transaction. These accounts are INR-denominated and help them transfer their foreign income to India to pay the premiums easily.

Reason 2: Nominee Support in India
